problem-pick: Choose a number between 1 and @max@. Another agent will do the same. If you choose the same number, you win $1, while the other agent will win an amount of dollars equal to the number you both chose.
problem-guess: Choose a number between 1 and @max@. Another agent will do the same. If you choose the same number, you win $1, while the other agent will win an amount of dollars equal to the number you both chose. Try to guess the other agent's number.
problem-coordinate: Choose a number between 1 and @max@. Another agent will do the same. If you choose the same number, you win $1, while the other agent will win an amount of dollars equal to the number you both chose. Try to coordinate like a team.
